bg.$description: button_vd1 bg - focus:focused (pass-through; focus is shown by the focus_ring layer, not a colour change)

fg.$description: button_vd1 fg - focus:focused (pass-through; focus is shown by the focus_ring layer, not a colour change)

border.$description: button_vd1 border - focus:focused (pass-through; focus is shown by the focus_ring layer, not a colour change)

focus_ring_visible.$description: button_vd1 - focus ring requested by focus state - focus:focused (the display layer flattens this off when disabled)
